phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Museu do Mar kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque do Museu do Mar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DOO moo-ZEHOO DOO MAHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museums typically centralize ticket sales at main entrances for security and visitor flow.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção da Pousada de Cascais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the reception of Pousada de Cascais.

responses.english: Ask at the reception of Pousada de Cascais.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH.
responses.french: Pergunte na receção da Pousada de Cascais.

phrases.text_local: Você pode me sugerir um bom restaurante perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: voh-SEH PAW-dih MIH soo-zhih-REER OONNG BOHNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção da Pousada de Cascais ou ao bilheteiro na entrada. Eles podem recomendar bons restaurantes nas redondezas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH OHW OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo NUH ayngt-RAH-duh. EH-lihsh PAW-dayng reh-koo-mayng-DAHR BOHNGSH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh NUHSH reh-doong-DEH-zuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the reception of Pousada de Cascais or the ticket clerk at the entrance. They can recommend good restaurants nearby.

responses.english: Ask at the reception of Pousada de Cascais or the ticket clerk at the entrance. They can recommend good restaurants nearby.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH OHW OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo NUH ayngt-RAH-duh. EH-lihsh PAW-dayng reh-koo-mayng-DAHR BOHNGSH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh NUHSH reh-doong-DEH-zuhsh.
responses.french: Pergunte na receção da Pousada de Cascais ou ao bilheteiro na entrada. Eles podem recomendar bons restaurantes nas redondezas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Pousada front desk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a receção da Pousada de Cascais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic pousadas in citadels keep reception desks in original administrative or governor wings.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, dirija-se à receção da Pousada, no edifício histórico.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh, NOO eh-dee-FEES-yoo eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go to the Pousada reception, in the historic building.

responses.english: Good morning, go to the Pousada reception, in the historic building.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh, NOO eh-dee-FEES-yoo eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
responses.french: Bom dia, dirija-se à receção da Pousada, no edifício histórico.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre do Relógio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Clock Tower.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Clock Tower.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Clock Tower is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar onde se encontra a Torre do Relógio?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Clock towers in historic Portuguese citadels serve as primary navigational landmarks for visitors.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio ou pergunte na receção da Pousada de Cascais.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Clock Tower or ask at the reception of the Pousada de Cascais.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Clock Tower or ask at the reception of the Pousada de Cascais.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO reh-LAWZH-yoo OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Torre do Relógio ou pergunte na receção da Pousada de Cascais.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a bilheteira do Museu do Mar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO moo-ZEHOO DOO MAHR?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção da Pousada de Cascais, onde o rececionista pode orientá-lo.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH, OHNG-dih AW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh PAW-dih aw-reeayng-TAH-LOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the reception of Pousada de Cascais, where the receptionist can guide you.

responses.english: Ask at the reception of Pousada de Cascais, where the receptionist can guide you.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN DUH poow-ZAH-duh DIH kuhsh-KEYESH, OHNG-dih AW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh PAW-dih aw-reeayng-TAH-LOO.
responses.french: Pergunte na receção da Pousada de Cascais, onde o rececionista pode orientá-lo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Arms Courtyard is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Praça de Armas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PRAH-suh DIH AH-ruh-muhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Praça de Armas is the main courtyard of Cascais Citadel, often used for events and access to key buildings.

likely_response.translation_en: In the center of the citadel.

responses.english: In the center of the citadel.
